name: Chicken Parmesan (Rice)
recipeIngredient: 6 large Chicken thighs (about 1 1/2 pounds), skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken between waxed paper or plastic wrap to about 1/4-inch thickness.
2. Mix flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish.
3. Coat chicken with the flour mixture.
4. In another shallow dish, mix milk and egg.
5. Dip chicken into milk mixture; coat with bread crumbs.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until hot.
8. Cook chicken in oil, turning once, until golden brown. Add more oil to the skillet if necessary.
9. Place chicken in an ungreased rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches, with mozzarella cheese.
10. Pour spaghetti sauce over the cheese.
11. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
12. Bake uncovered about 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
6 servings.
